title: Great Lakes Wholesale Group ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] Great Lakes Wholesale Group is a wholesale distributor providing a wide variety of general merchandise to dollar stores, discount stores, and grocery stores. The company offers products across several categories including health & beauty, groceries, household, houseware, hardware, toys, party supplies, pet supplies and others. They offer goods at a lower price point and are based in Lockport, Illinois, USA.
